# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

# ARM template file that creates an Azure Function, Managed Identity and grants broad permissions on Storage Accounts (Read/Write), Key Vaults(Full Access) , SQL Servers & Cosmos DB's 
parameters:
- name: 'storageAccountNamePrefix' # prefix for the storage account names in case you have multiple environments with similar naming convention. Default is empty string ''  
  type: string   
  default: ""    
resources:
# Create an Azure Function App and Managed Identity (if not already created) to host your serverless functions, then grant broad permissions on Storage Accounts & Key Vault Accesses for the function app. This is done by creating a role assignment with 'Storage Blob Data Contributor' or similar roles in case you want more granular access control
- type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities  # User assigned managed identity resource  
  name: myResourceGroup_myFuncAppId   
# Create an Azure Function App and Managed Identity (if not already created) to host your serverless functions, then grant broad permissions on Storage Accounts & Key Vault Accesses for the function app. This is done by creating a role assignment with 'Storage Blob Data Contributor' or similar roles in case you want more granular access control
- type: Microsoft.Web/sites  # Web site resource  
  name: myResourceGroup_myFuncAppId   
# Create an Azure Function App and Managed Identity (if not already created) to host your serverless functions, then grant broad permissions on Storage Account's & Key Vault Accesses for the function app. This is done by creating a role assignment with 'Storage Blob Data Contributor', or similar roles in case you want more granular access control
- type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines  # Virtual Machine resource  
  name: myResourceGroup_myFuncAppId
